evals.prompt: schreib bitte einen Jira-Kommentar auf OROSPD-692: der cart-merge-on-login Test failt weil die Fixture keine CPL hat, muss noch wait-for-AJAX rein. MR ist !1102, pipeline grün. danke
evals.expected_output: Compose a German Jira comment that uses canonical technical verbs (schlägt fehl, fehlt, wirft) and impersonal voice. No anglicisms like 'failt' in the output.
expectations: Uses 'schlägt fehl' or 'fällt durch' for the test failure (not 'failt')
Uses Jira wiki markup (h3., {{monospace}}, table syntax)

evals.prompt: HMKG-2202 ticket beschreibung muss neu geschrieben werden — problem/ziel format auf deutsch, ein satz problem, 2-3 akzeptanzkriterien, out of scope nur das kit-feature. bitte jira wiki markup
evals.expected_output: German Jira ticket description in Problem/Ziel/Akzeptanzkriterien/Out of Scope structure with wiki markup, impersonal voice.
expectations: Uses h2. headings: Problem, Ziel, Akzeptanzkriterien, Out of Scope

evals.prompt: release notes eintrag auf deutsch schreiben für den neuen cart-merge-on-login fix, ein bullet, für das interne changelog
evals.expected_output: Single bullet German release-note entry, noun-phrase header, no first-person.

evals.prompt: Bitte schreib eine kurze Slack-Ankündigung ans HMKG team auf deutsch: Pipeline CI-383 ist grün, QA kann starten, MR !1089 review willkommen
evals.expected_output: Short German Slack announcement using canonical idiom (Hinweis, not 'Heads up').
expectations: Uses 'Hinweis' or similar German lead-in (not 'Heads up')

evals.prompt: translate this to german for a jira comment: 'The test fails because the fixture is empty. This happens when PricingStorageIsolator runs before the Combined* rebuild finishes. Fix: wait for idle before asserting.'
evals.expected_output: Natural German technical prose with 'schlägt fehl', 'leer', no anglicisms.

evals.prompt: whats the status of HMKG-2202? is it ready for QA?
evals.expected_output: English status response. Should NOT invoke german-technical-writing skill (English query, no German artifact requested).
Brief acknowledgement reply. Should NOT invoke german-technical-writing skill (single-word German chat reply).

evals.prompt: translate this jira comment from german to english so i can forward it to Oro corporate: 'Der Test schlägt fehl weil die Fixture leer ist, wir fixen das in MR !1102'
evals.expected_output: English translation. Should NOT invoke german-technical-writing skill (German→English direction, not German composition).

evals.prompt: explain to me what Konjunktiv II is in german grammar and when native speakers use it vs Indikativ
evals.expected_output: Grammar explanation in English. Should NOT invoke german-technical-writing skill (abstract grammar question, not artifact composition).

evals.prompt: rename the variable `user` to `benutzer` in src/Meyer/ThemeBundle/Controller/AuthController.php and update the tests
evals.expected_output: Code edit. Should NOT invoke german-technical-writing skill (code task, German identifier name doesn't trigger).
